# Jeremy Dubs — Cascade Creatives

## About
Jeremy Dubs operates Cascade Creatives, a video production and website upgrade business based in Bellingham, WA. He works directly with local businesses and regional brands — no agency overhead.

## Services
- **Video Production & Editing**: Commercial video, social content, real estate tours, brand films, drone (FAA Part 107 licensed), and remote post-production.
- **Website Upgrades**: Homepage rewrites, CTA improvements, navigation fixes, trust signals, local SEO, and spam cleanup — without full rebuilds.

## Service Area
- On-location: Western Washington (Whatcom, Skagit, King County, Eastside)
- Remote editing & website work: Nationwide

## Key Clients
- Cascade Pest Control (ongoing video production)
- All Star Lake Spa (website upgrade)
- NW Montessori School (anniversary film)
- Marcel Dolak, Engel & Völkers (luxury real estate video)
